reviews.review_msg: lucas is hilarious, caring, brilliant, and super flexible. the course is tough and you can't slide by but if you put in the work it will probably change your outlook on life! he helped me learn how to write... never had a prof put so many comments on my work! encouraging, fun, challenging, recommended.

Although I've had intro classes with Helen and have enjoyed them, this particular class was pretty ridiculous.A lot of tedious group discussion, and 5 entire books assigned.Very hard to stay engaged w/material, especially b/c Helen's discussion facilitation was often repetitious and even a bit self serving.Her intro classes are alot better tho!
